info.description: Sub-pages under /experiences (Workshops, Retreats, Corporate Wellbeing, Speaking).

slug.description: URL slug. Must match the route exactly: 'workshops', 'retreats', 'corporate-wellbeing', 'speaking'.

kicker.description: Small uppercase label above the title.

kickerColour.description: Hex colour for the kicker. Default blue #7BAFDD.

heroImage.description: Main image at the top of the page.

intro.description: Main body. Separate paragraphs with a BLANK LINE between them.
